   ├─ 🔧 resources {[2m[90mlimits[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mmemory:512Mi[0m, [2m[90mrequests[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mcpu:100m memory:128Mi[0m}
   ├─ 🔒 secrets
   │  └─ 🔐 external secret source secrets-store.csi.k8s.io {[2m[90mdriver[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90msecrets-store.csi.k8s.io[0m, [2m[90msecretProviderClass[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop-tennant-petshopvault[0m}
   │     ├─ 🔏 provider config petshop-tennant-petshopvault {[2m[90mprovider[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mazure[0m, [2m[90msecretObjects[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m1[0m}
   │     ├─ 🔒 synced secret petshop-tennant-secrets {[2m[90mkeys[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m2[0m, [2m[90mtype[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mOpaque[0m}
   │     │  ├─ 💬 [37mLDAP_SECRET[0m[90m=[0m<SECRET> {[2m[90mkey[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mPBS-TENNANT-PASSWORD[0m}
   │     │  └─ 💬 [37mNEO4J_PASSWORD[0m[90m=[0m<SECRET> {[2m[90mkey[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mPBS-DATABASE-PASSWORD[0m}
   │     └─ 📁 mounted in container /mnt/secrets {[2m[90mdriver[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90msecrets-store.csi.k8s.io[0m, [2m[90mmode[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mcsi[0m, [2m[90mreadOnly[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mtrue[0m, [2m[90msecretProviderClass[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop-tennant-petshopvault[0m, [2m[90mvolume[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshopvault[0m}
   └─ 🛡️ securitycontext {[2m[90mallowPrivilegeEscalation[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mfalse[0m, [2m[90mcapabilitiesDrop[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[ALL][0m, [2m[90mreadOnlyRootFilesystem[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mfalse[0m, [2m[90mrunAsNonRoot[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mtrue[0m, [2m[90mrunAsUser[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m1000[0m, [2m[90mseccompProfile[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mRuntimeDefault[0m}

🕸 ciliumnetworkpolicy allow-external-egress {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}
└─ 👈 cnp-egress toentities {[2m[90mentities[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[cluster][0m}

🕸 ciliumnetworkpolicy allow-observability {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}
└─ 👈 cnp-egress toendpoint {[2m[90mmatchLabels[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mapp.kubernetes.io/name:prometheus[0m}

🕸 ciliumnetworkpolicy allow-tracing {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}
├─ 🎯 endpointselector label tracing=enabled
└─ 👈 cnp-egress toendpoint {[2m[90mmatchLabels[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mapp.kubernetes.io/name:tempo[0m}

👤 serviceaccount default {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}

⚙ configmap kube-root-ca.crt {[2m[90mkeys[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m1[0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}

📏 limitrange petshop-limits {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}

📊 resourcequota petshop-quota {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m}

🔒 secret tls-wildcard-cert {[2m[90mkeys[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m3[0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m, [2m[90mtype[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mkubernetes.io/tls[0m}

📜 certificate expired-cert [[31mNOTREADY, EXPIRED 5D AGO[0m] {[2m[90mdnsNames[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[expired.mock.no][0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mmanagement[0m, [2m[90mready[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mFalse[0m, [2m[90mreadyReason[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mExpired[0m}

⛩️ gateway internal-gateway [[31mPROGRAMMED[0m] {[2m[90mgatewayClass[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mcilium[0m, [2m[90mlisteners[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[443/HTTPS][0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mmanagement[0m}
├─ 📜 certificate default-gateway-certificate [[32mEXPIRES IN 14D[0m] {[2m[90mdnsNames[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[*.mock.no *.mock.com][0m, [2m[90mready[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mTrue[0m, [2m[90mreadyReason[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mReady[0m}
│  └─ 🗝️ clusterissuer letsencrypt-prod {[2m[90memail[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mboys@petshop.com[0m, [2m[90mserver[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mhttps://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory[0m, [2m[90mtype[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90macme[0m}
├─ 🔄 httproute petshop-backend-boys {[2m[90mhostnames[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[backend-boys.petshop.com backend-boys.petshop.com][0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m, [2m[90mpaths[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[/*][0m, [2m[90mservice[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop-backend-boys:8080/TCP (ClusterIP)[0m}
├─ 🔄 httproute petshop-frontend-girls {[2m[90mhostnames[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[frontend-girls.petshop.com frontend-girls.petshop.com][0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m, [2m[90mpaths[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[/*][0m, [2m[90mservice[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop-frontend-girls:8080/TCP (ClusterIP)[0m}

└─ 🔄 httproute petshop-tennant {[2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop[0m, [2m[90mpaths[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[/*][0m, [2m[90mservice[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mpetshop-tennant:8080/TCP (ClusterIP)[0m}

📜 certificate long-lived-cert [[32mEXPIRES IN 59D[0m] {[2m[90mdnsNames[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90m[long-lived.mock.no][0m, [2m[90mnamespace[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mmanagement[0m, [2m[90mready[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mTrue[0m, [2m[90mreadyReason[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mReady[0m}
└─ 🔑 issuer management-ca {[2m[90mcaSecret[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mmanagement-ca-keypair[0m, [2m[90mtype[0m[37m=[0m[1m[90mca[0m}
